title: Board view sorting on web does not work on mobile
excerpt: I have a board view that sorts by due date. It looks correct on web. But on mobile, that view filters but does not sort.  I have a work-around using the “My Work” tab on mobile.  But, the saved board views should look th…

posts.author: BrianB23 (Brian Barnes)
posts.cookedHtml: I have a board view that sorts by due date. It looks correct on web. But on mobile, that view filters but does not sort. I have a work-around using the “My Work” tab on mobile. But, the saved board views should look the same on mobile and web.
